legal.disclaimer: DawaiSaathi organizes your prescribed medicines. It is not medical advice. Always confirm changes with your doctor or pharmacist.

feedback.title: Help improve DawaiSaathi
feedback.privacy: Please do not include medicine names, prescriptions, phone numbers, or other private health details.
feedback.improvementPrompt: What would make DawaiSaathi easier or more useful?
feedback.appreciationPrompt: What did you like, and why did it help?
feedback.improvementPlaceholder: A small improvement or feature request…
feedback.appreciationPlaceholder: Something that felt useful or reassuring…
feedback.sent: Thank you—your feedback has been sent to the DawaiSaathi team.
feedback.sendError: We could not send feedback right now. Please try again later.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Set up reminders for yourself or someone you care for. It takes about a minute.
onboarding.setupBody: Start with the phone that should ring at medicine time. You can scan medicines next.
onboarding.medicinePromise: Built for people managing many medicines: clear reminder calls, simple confirmations, and caregiver follow-ups.
onboarding.nameRequired: Please enter your name to continue.
onboarding.privacyNote: You can review, change, or erase the medicine information you add in Settings.
onboarding.patientBody: Choose yourself or a family member, then add the number that should receive reminder calls.
onboarding.patientRequired: Please enter the person's name to continue.
onboarding.phone_help: We call this number at medicine time. Works on any phone — no app needed.
onboarding.phoneHelp: Choose the country code, then enter the phone number used for medicine reminders.
onboarding.smsConsentTitle: Send a private SMS follow-up if calls are not confirmed
onboarding.smsConsentBody: Only a general DawaiSaathi follow-up is sent after the final call attempt. It never includes medicine names or doses. Reply STOP at any time to stop SMS.
onboarding.smsLanguagePending: SMS follow-up is being reviewed for this call language. Voice reminders and the dashboard still work.
onboarding.careForSomeone: I am setting this up for someone else
onboarding.langTitle: Which language should {name}'s calls be in?
onboarding.voiceBody: Choose the language and voice your family member will hear. You can change both later in Settings.
onboarding.callLanguageHelp: Choose the language your family member is most comfortable hearing. It can be changed later in Settings.
onboarding.generatedVoiceRequirement: Phone calls in this language use generated voice audio. Keep voice audio enabled for live reminders.
onboarding.previewHelp: A short sample will play before you finish setup.
onboarding.previewDevice: Using your device's voice for this preview. Your selected call voice is saved.
onboarding.previewUnavailable: We couldn't play a preview right now. Your selected call language and voice will still be saved.
onboarding.finishError: We couldn't finish setup. Please try again.
onboarding.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number for the selected country.

home.empty: Add medicines by photographing the strips
home.notConfirmed: Not confirmed after reminder calls. This does not tell us whether the medicine was taken.
home.callFailed: We couldn't place the call. Please try again.
home.markFailed: We couldn't mark this dose as taken. Please try again.
home.loadError: We couldn't load today's medicines. Please refresh and try again.
home.bootstrapUnavailable: We couldn't securely connect to DawaiSaathi yet. Your setup has not been changed.
home.expiredMedicine: {name} is expired. Please confirm with a pharmacist before using it.
home.expiringMedicine: {name} expires soon. Please check the strip before the next dose.
home.alertReadError: We couldn't update that follow-up. Please try again.
home.allDoneTitle: All of today's medicines are taken

scan.title: Scan medicines
scan.tips: Lay strips flat in daylight. Include the printed back side, batch, expiry, and manufacturer.
scan.dropzone: Drop or tap to add photos (1–5)
scan.error_retry: We couldn't read this clearly — one more photo in daylight will help.
scan.unsupportedImage: Use a JPG, PNG, or WebP photo.
scan.photoFormats: Add up to {max} clear JPG, PNG, or WebP photos (up to 4 MB each).

review.title: Check what we found ({n})
review.subtitle: We read these from your photos. Please correct anything wrong.
review.expired: This strip is expired ({date}). Do not use — replace it.
review.saltRequired: Add at least one salt for every medicine before confirming.
review.packCheckNotice: We can read pack details, but a photo cannot prove a medicine is genuine. Only an official manufacturer or authorised pharmacist can verify that.
review.packExpiredBody: The expiry date is clearly past. Do not use this pack; ask a pharmacist for a replacement.
review.packUnclearBody: The name, salt, or expiry is not clear enough. Photograph the printed side flat in daylight before relying on it.
review.packDetailsBody: Please find or enter: {fields}. They may be on the strip, carton, or outer label.
review.packCapturedBody: You now have the details needed to ask an authorised pharmacist or use the official manufacturer check.
review.packNotVerdict: This is a pack-detail check, not a genuine-or-fake verdict.
review.prescriptionConfirmation: I checked each medicine name, strength, and instructions against the prescription, pack, or a pharmacist’s directions. DawaiSaathi does not decide what to take.
review.prescriptionConfirmationRequired: Please confirm that you checked the medicines against the prescription, pack, or pharmacist instructions.

safety.title: Safety check
safety.consult: Discuss with your doctor before the next dose.
safety.unverified_note: Not verified in our sources — ask your pharmacist.
safety.noneTitle: No known interactions found among these {n} medicines
safety.noneBody: We check curated data and FDA labels. Always tell every doctor everything you take.
safety.degraded: Checked against built-in database only (FDA labels unavailable).
safety.loadError: We couldn't load the safety check. Please try again.
safety.recheckError: We couldn't re-check these medicines. Please try again.
safety.acknowledgeError: We couldn't save that acknowledgement. Please try again.

savings.title: Savings with Jan Aushadhi
savings.noSavingsSummary: We have not found a verified saving yet.
savings.caption: Same salt, same strength. Confirm the switch with your pharmacist.
savings.loadError: We couldn't load savings right now. Please try again.
savings.empty: No verified generic matches are available yet. Check again after adding medicines.

schedule.title: Set reminder times
schedule.doseInstruction: Exact dose to say in the call
schedule.doseHelp: Copy the verified wording from the prescription or pack in the language the patient will hear. DawaiSaathi repeats it exactly.
schedule.doseInstructionRequired: Enter the exact dose wording for every active reminder before continuing.
schedule.instructionsNotice: These are editable reminders, not dosing advice. Check every time, exact dose phrase, and food instruction against the prescription, pack, or pharmacist directions.
schedule.instructionsConfirmation: I checked these reminder times and food instructions against the prescription, pack, or pharmacist’s directions.
schedule.instructionsConfirmationRequired: Please confirm the reminder instructions before starting calls.
schedule.previewUnavailable: Voice preview is unavailable. It will be ready once voice is configured.
schedule.loadError: We couldn't load your medicines. Please try again.
schedule.saveError: We couldn't save the reminder schedule. Please try again.
schedule.empty: Add a medicine before setting reminder times.
schedule.stopRemindersBody: These medicines have no selected time. Continuing will stop their active reminders and cancel future pending reminders.
schedule.mtx_warning: Methotrexate is usually taken WEEKLY, not daily — confirm the schedule with the doctor before continuing. Type {name} to override.

history.title: Reminders & adherence
history.loadError: We couldn't load your history. Please try again.
history.audioUnavailable: This call audio could not be played.

profile.title: Profile & settings
profile.smsConsentBody: After final unanswered call attempts, send a general reminder only—never medicine names or doses. Reply STOP to opt out. Changing this phone number turns SMS off until you consent again.
profile.loadError: We couldn't load your profile. Please try again.
profile.deletePhotosConfirm: Delete all uploaded medicine photos? Your confirmed medicine list will stay.
profile.deletePhotosError: We couldn't delete the photos. Please try again.
profile.saveError: We couldn't save that change. Please try again.
profile.eraseError: We couldn't erase your data. Please try again.
profile.demoLoadConfirm: Load the Kamla Devi demo? This replaces current data.
profile.demoLoadError: We couldn't load the demo. Please try again.

call.simFailed: The simulated call could not start. Please try again.

auth.heroTitle: Care starts with a secure sign-in.
auth.heroBody: DawaiSaathi keeps each household separate before medicines, schedules, calls, and alerts can load.
auth.proofPrivacy: One caregiver account opens only its own household.
auth.proofReminder: Reminder phone numbers stay separate from sign-in.
auth.proofCareTeam: Invited caregivers can be added or removed later.
auth.title: Keep your family’s plan private
auth.body: Use your caregiver email to continue. Phone sign-in appears only after secure SMS delivery is configured for this deployment.
auth.phoneDisabled: Phone sign-in is not enabled on this deployment yet. Email sign-in is the stable path for caregiver accounts.
auth.phoneHelp: Use the caregiver’s phone, not the number that receives medicine reminders.
auth.emailHelp: Use the address that received a caregiver invitation, if you have one.
auth.phoneInvalid: Enter your phone number with country code, for example +9198…
auth.sendError: We could not send a secure sign-in message. Please try again.
auth.verifyError: We could not verify that code. Please try again.
auth.codeInvalid: Enter the code from the message.
auth.emailSent: A secure sign-in link was sent to {email}. Open it on this device to continue.
auth.codeSent: We sent a sign-in code to {phone}. It expires soon and is only for this caregiver account.
auth.invalidLink: This sign-in link is incomplete. Request a new one and try again.
auth.expiredLink: This sign-in link has expired or was already used. Request a new one and try again.

invite.title: Join a family’s care team
invite.body: You will only get access if this invitation was sent to the verified phone number or email address on your caregiver account.
invite.invalid: This invitation link is incomplete or invalid. Ask the household owner to send a fresh invitation.
invite.accessNote: The owner can remove your access later, and this link can only be used once.
invite.acceptError: We could not accept this invitation. Please try again.

secureSetup.title: Your caregiver account is separate now.
secureSetup.body: We are completing the final secure-data checks before medicine records, scans, calls, and patient details are enabled for this account.
secureSetup.pause: This pause is intentional: no signed-in caregiver can fall back to the old shared demo household while we verify row-level privacy controls.
secureSetup.saved: Household setup is saved securely. We’ll unlock the full medicine workspace after the tenant rollout checks pass.
